subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-12 in London
subcodes.first_line: It is not permissible even to strike an animal. When an animal is trained properly, it becomes domesticated
subcodes.first_line_orig: ضرب برای حیوان هم جائز نه حُسن تربیت حیوان را در تحت تعلیم
subcodes.subjects: @kindness to and rights of animals, @education of children; moral education, @spiritual transformation
